2026-2027 Undergraduate Academic Calendar

Fall 2026

Aug 26, WedFirst day of classes for undergraduate schools
Oct 22-23, Thur-FriFall break for undergraduate students
Nov 21-Nov 29, Sat-SunThanksgiving holidays in most schools

Spring 2027

Jan 11, MonFirst day of classes for undergraduate schools
Mar 13-21, Sat-SunSpring Break
May 14, FriCommencement
